ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the backend used for the simulation */,
  "executor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executor used for the simulation */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solver used for the simulation */,
  "preconditioner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preconditioner used for the simulation */,
  "resolution" INTEGER /* Resolution of the simulation */,
  "processes" INTEGER /* Number of processes used for the simulation */,
  "run_time" REAL /* Run time of the simulation in seconds */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the simulation was successful */,
  "number_of_iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations performed by the solver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was last updated */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the simulation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project to which the simulation belongs */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store simulation parameters */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_preconditioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("preconditioner_id") REFERENCES preconditioners ("preconditioner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_backend_id FOREIGN KEY ("backend_id") REFERENCES backends ("backend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_executor_id FOREIGN KEY ("executor_id") REFERENCES executors ("executor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backends" (
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backend */,
  "backend_name" TEXT /* Name of the backend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the backend */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the backend */,
  "supported_executors" TEXT /* JSON field to store supported executors */,
  "supported_solvers" TEXT /* JSON field to store supported solvers */,
  "supported_preconditioners" TEXT /* JSON field to store supported preconditioners */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executors" (
  "executor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executor */,
  "executor_name" TEXT /* Name of the executor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the executor */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the executor */,
  "supported_backends" TEXT /* JSON field to store supported backends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solvers" (
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solver */,
  "solver_name" TEXT /* Name of the solver */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the solver */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the solver */,
  "supported_backends" TEXT /* JSON field to store supported backends */,
  "supported_preconditioners" TEXT /* JSON field to store supported preconditioners */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preconditioners" (
  "preconditioner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preconditioner */,
  "preconditioner_name" TEXT /* Name of the preconditioner */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the preconditioner */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the preconditioner */,
  "supported_backends" TEXT /* JSON field to store supported backends */,
  "supported_solvers" TEXT /* JSON field to store supported solvers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preconditioner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the log entry pertains to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., start, stop, edit) */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was logged */,
  "details" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the metric pertains to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., CPU, memory, network) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware profile */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware profile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hardware profile */,
  "cpu_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores */,
  "gpu_cores" INTEGER /* Number of GPU cores */,
  "memory_gb" REAL /* Total memory in GB */,
  "storage_gb" REAL /* Total storage in GB */,
  "network_bandwidth_gb_per_sec" REAL /* Network bandwidth in GB per second */,
  "gpu_type" TEXT /* Type of GPU (e.g., NVIDIA, AMD) */,
  "cpu_type" TEXT /* Type of CPU (e.g., Intel, AMD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_hardware" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware profile used for the simulation */,
  "configuration_details" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional configuration details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_hardware_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_hardware_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES hardware_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
